title: Can't edit posts
excerpt: I can’t add a 4th reply to a post here on the community site. The system tells me I should edit an old post instead. Okay, but I can’t figure out how to edit old posts. If I delete a post, it still counts against the 3.

posts.author: mgambrell (Matthew Gambrell)
posts.cookedHtml: I can’t add a 4th reply to a post here on the community site. The system tells me I should edit an old post instead. Okay, but I can’t figure out how to edit old posts. If I delete a post, it still counts against the 3.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @mgambrell!

Sorry to hear this

Would you be happy to share a screenshot so we can see exactly what’s happening when you attempt to edit a community post?

posts.author: mgambrell (Matthew Gambrell)
posts.cookedHtml:
I can’t attempt to do it. I can’t even figure out how to do it.
EDIT: - WHAT??? I HAVE TO SELECT THE TEXT AND THEN CLICK EDIT? NEVER HAVE I EVER SEEN THIS BEFORE
EDIT 2: WHAT??? I HAVE TO SELECT -ALL- THE TEXT?
EDIT 3: Will it let me do this?
EDIT 4: How about this?

posts.author: mgambrell (Matthew Gambrell)
posts.cookedHtml: And yet it still doesn’t work. Here’s a picture of me trying to edit that other post:

posts.author: mgambrell (Matthew Gambrell)
posts.cookedHtml: Any news?? I need to complain again on the backspace thread but I can’t.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @mgambrell,

My sincerest apologies for missing your responses here

Can you please share with me the link to the post you’re referencing so I can look into this?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for sharing! Are you able to edit this particular message?

Screen Shot 2023-04-28 at 10.11.31 am1566×386 24.8 KB

I have also responded to your comment, so please let me know if you are able to reply to my comment!

posts.author: mgambrell (Matthew Gambrell)
posts.cookedHtml: I can’t edit that comment. When I select the text, I don’t get an edit prompt. And there’s no pencil icon. I can edit the post I just posted though (the reply you requested)

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: I can see the reply went through - I have also deleted one of your comments to allow for an additional comment on that post. Can you try commenting once more?

posts.author: mgambrell (Matthew Gambrell)
posts.cookedHtml: OK, well I really just wanted to spam complaints so deleting comments to make room for others is counterproductive. BUT OK, at least I was able to post an update about how it’s still broken. Thanks.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: I am investigating the comment limit internally to better understand why this might be happening. That said, in regard to your feature request, for some background, every quarter we take the features with the top votes to our development team for a response. As such, the greater the votes the better in order to get this request on our developers radar. We encourage you to share the request around to get the votes up on your request

posts.author: mgambrell (Matthew Gambrell)
posts.cookedHtml: Still limited to 3 replies. Still trying to spam complaints. Still can’t delete own posts or reply to them. Why do I feel like I’m in a ghost town here?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Matthew,

I am sorry for my failure to follow up with you!

Can you please let me know if you run into the same issue again? I’ve made an adjustment on the back end

posts.author: mgambrell (Matthew Gambrell)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yep, that worked. Thanks. If only the team responsible for te–

ctrl+backspace works fine here. let the record show. it works beautifully. now then, ahem:

If only the team responsible for the app itself were as responsive as the team responsible for handling complaints about how unresponsive the team responsible for the app is, then monday.com would be… … making me feel more like it’s a friday. Heard that one yet? The irony of me posting that on a sunday night is not lost on me. Hey, it’ll be monday again in a few minutes. Looking forward to another week of hitting (ctrl+backspace, space) for a while until it just begins to reprogram my brain, then switching elsewhere and doing the same thing, which yields spurious spaces in the middle of whatever I write until my brain is deprogrammed backed to normal key input again.
